creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-06-06 13:15:29 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    converters/ascii2binary Makefile 
    converters/gbase     Makefile 
    converters/konwert   Makefile 
    converters/ktextdecode Makefile 
    converters/libticonv Makefile 
    converters/p5-Convert-Recode Makefile 
    converters/php4-recode Makefile 
    converters/php5-recode Makefile 
    converters/recode    Makefile 
  Log:
  Bump portrevision due to upgrade of devel/gettext.
  
  The affected ports are the ones with gettext as a run-dependency
  according to ports/INDEX-7 (5007 of them) and the ones with USE_GETTEXT
  in Makefile (29 of them).
  
  PR:             ports/124340
  Submitted by:   edwin@
  Approved by:    portmgr (pav)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.8       +1 -0      ports/converters/ascii2binary/Makefile
  1.12      +1 -1      ports/converters/gbase/Makefile
  1.10      +1 -1      ports/converters/konwert/Makefile
  1.19      +1 -1      ports/converters/ktextdecode/Makefile
  1.6       +1 -0      ports/converters/libticonv/Makefile
  1.12      +1 -0      ports/converters/p5-Convert-Recode/Makefile
  1.2       +1 -0      ports/converters/php4-recode/Makefile
  1.2       +1 -0      ports/converters/php5-recode/Makefile
  1.38      +1 -1      ports/converters/recode/Makefile
